_meta.expectedBranches: purchase shared ownership employed with positive rent
_meta.fieldsExercised: shared ownership yes, share percentage, rent included in household expenditure
_meta.zeroResultPolicy: A zero result is valid only if Virgin Money returns the explicit cannot-help results page.
_meta.validityChecks: Shared ownership rent is positive; LTV is within normal range for a valid calculation attempt.
_meta.virginMoneyAssumptions: Virgin Money supports Purchase/Remortgage; further advance is represented as remortgage additional borrowing. Interest-only samples keep total income at or above 75000 and age plus term no more than 75. Other-property cases include positive repayment/rent values when Virgin asks for them.
